allow: Bash(php -r 'require '\\''vendor/autoload.php'\\''; $app = require '\\''bootstrap/app.php'\\''; $app->make\('\\''Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel'\\''\)->bootstrap\(\); $categories = DB::table\('\\''categories'\\''\)->get\(['\\''id'\\'','\\''name'\\'']\); foreach\($categories as $c\){ echo $c->id.'\\'' - '\\''.$c->name.PHP_EOL; } echo '\\''---EQUIPMENT---'\\''.PHP_EOL; echo '\\''count: '\\''.DB::table\('\\''equipment'\\''\)->count\(\).PHP_EOL; $eq = DB::table\('\\''equipment'\\''\)->orderBy\('\\''id'\\'','\\''desc'\\''\)->limit\(3\)->get\(\); foreach\($eq as $e\){ print_r\($e\); }')

Bash(php -r 'require '\\''vendor/autoload.php'\\''; $app = require '\\''bootstrap/app.php'\\''; $app->make\('\\''Illuminate\\Contracts\\Console\\Kernel'\\''\)->bootstrap\(\); echo '\\''Total equipment rows: '\\''.DB::table\('\\''equipment'\\''\)->count\(\).PHP_EOL; echo PHP_EOL.'\\''Added in this batch \(IH- serials\):'\\''.PHP_EOL; foreach\(DB::table\('\\''equipment'\\''\)->where\('\\''serial_number'\\'','\\''like'\\'','\\''IH-%'\\''\)->orderBy\('\\''id'\\''\)->get\(['\\''id'\\'','\\''name'\\'','\\''serial_number'\\'','\\''category_id'\\'','\\''status'\\'','\\''condition'\\'']\) as $e\){ echo str_pad\($e->id,3\).'\\'' | '\\''.str_pad\($e->serial_number,12\).'\\'' | cat '\\''.$e->category_id.'\\'' | '\\''.$e->status.'\\'' | '\\''.$e->condition.'\\'' | '\\''.$e->name.PHP_EOL; }')
